rubrics.name: Understanding of Key Concepts
rubrics.description: Evaluates how well the participant understands and explains the core concepts, frameworks, and learnings from the program. Focuses on clarity of thought, conceptual depth, and relevance to the discussed modules.

rubrics.name: Application of Learning
rubrics.description: Assesses the participant’s ability to apply program learnings in real workplace situations. Emphasis is placed on practical examples, relevance of actions taken, and connection between learning and execution.

rubrics.name: Impact & Outcomes
rubrics.description: Measures the effectiveness and results achieved through the application of learning. Focuses on improvements, outcomes, business impact, or positive changes resulting from the participant’s actions.

rubrics.name: Action Orientation (Forward Plan)
rubrics.description: Evaluates how clearly the participant defines future actions and implementation plans based on their learning experience. Focuses on ownership, feasibility, and measurable next steps.

rubrics.name: Presentation Effectiveness
rubrics.description: Assesses the overall quality of the presentation including structure, communication clarity, professionalism, engagement, and visual effectiveness. Focuses on how effectively ideas are conveyed to the audience.
